framework.name: Visa Trusted Agent Protocol
framework.description: Visa has a named protocol called 'Trusted Agent Protocol' for secure communication between agents and merchants. This is their answer to Mastercard's Verifiable Intent — a distinct architectural approach using agent-to-merchant trust rather than signed-intent chains.
framework.raw_quote: enables secure communication between agents and merchants using Visa's Trusted Agent Protocol

source.title: Introducing Visa Intelligent Commerce on AWS: Enabling agentic commerce with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore | Artificial Intelligence
